name: @forgeax/hello-transform-hierarchy
description: ChildOf hierarchy parent-moves-child-follows visual exemplar (feat-20260531-render-consume-global-transform-hierarchy / M3 / w12).

forgeax._comment: smokeInvocation = self-contained SSOT. hello-transform-hierarchy exercises Transform.world + registerPropagateTransforms so a ChildOf child follows its parent's runtime world-space displacement; the dual-frame pixel-diff smoke moves the parent between two readbacks and asserts the child moved (diffCount > threshold) while a static reference frame stays stable.

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle (dist/assets) shape is downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: fps no-regression covered by hello-cube / hello-room / hello-app gates that run the default zero-overhead path; the hierarchy consume path adds no per-frame cost beyond the already-tracked propagateTransforms system

bench.reason: hierarchy consume exemplar; vitest bench focus stays on @forgeax/engine-math + @forgeax/engine-runtime, and the dual-frame smoke covers parent-moves-child-follows correctness

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; this is the M3 hello-transform-hierarchy visual-evidence exemplar
